items.name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BB172: Miu Miu new size briefcase, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a sophisticated multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, minimalist yet not simple. The new size offers better fit. Major fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 29X17X9cm (with original packaging)

Grey bowling bag look! Miu Miu Ladies Arcadia
Calfskin tote shoulder bag 👝 Lightweight padded design makes the bag look fuller, showcasing a metropolitan style. The letter logo echoes the finish of metal hardware, bridging the gap between function and decoration, giving this tote a unique beauty and classic air.
Size: 22✖️10.5✖️7.5cm
Style No.: 500142

items.name_en: 💖【New】MIU MIU Bestseller Bowling Bag, made of top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte finish with aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu's classic pieces, this Adventure Nappa leather handbag has a restructured, lighter design for a fresh personality. It creates a timeless classic with a unique look. Features a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with a zip pocket and slip pocket.
items.name_cn:
💖【New】MIU MIU Bestseller Bowling Bag, made of top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte finish with aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu's classic pieces, this Adventure Nappa leather handbag has a restructured, lighter design for a fresh personality. It creates a timeless classic with a unique look. Features a detachable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with a zip pocket and slip pocket.
Model: 5bb168.
Size: 33(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H)
Color: Black/Original Leather

items.name_en: 💖Includes full original retail packaging💖【New Arrival】Miu Miu's new best-selling bowling bag, made with top-tier vintage soft nappa leather, vintage matte-finish aged metal hardware. Inspired by Miu Miu's archival pieces, this Aventure Nappa tote has been restructured to be lighter and exudes a fresh personality, creating a classic style with timeless charm. The multi-element design gives this tote a unique aesthetic and classic vibe. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, canvas lining with zip pocket and slip pocket. Model: 5bb168. Dimensions: 33(L) x 16.5(W) x 10cm(H). Color: Brown/Original Leather
